title: deli A4 Sketchbook, Spiral Bound Sketch Pad with 160GSM Paper, Drawing Pad for Beginners & Art Students, Plain Paper Pad for Sketching, 40 Sheets / 80 Pages (Portrait)
features: 【Lightweight A4 Sketchbook】Portable A4 sketchbook with 40 sheets / 80 pages, perfect for beginners, art students, and sketching practice. Easy to carry for school, studio, or outdoor drawing sessions
【160GSM Acid-Free Paper】Premium sketch pad with thick, smooth paper that prevents ink bleed-through. Ideal drawing pad for sketching, shading, and light watercolour use
【Spiral Bound Design】The wire-bound sketch book lays flat for comfortable drawing and page turning, and allows easy sheet removal when needed
【Versatile Art Pad】Suitable for pencils, pens, markers, and charcoal. This plain paper pad works as a drawing pad, sketch pad, or art journal for creative projects
【Great for Everyday Use】A practical choice for classrooms, drawing lessons, or personal sketching. An affordable and functional A4 sketch pad for all levels of artists
description: Product Description Discover the Perfect Sketchbook for Every Artist From beginners to professionals, our A4 sketchbooks offer premium 160GSM paper and a practical spiral design – ideal for drawing, sketching, and creative projects. Ideal drawing pad for sketching, shading, and light watercolour use. Whether you are exploring art for the first time or building your creative skills, this plain paper pad is an affordable and practical choice for sketching, shading, and light watercolour washes. A versatile A4 sketch pad that fits perfectly into any artist’s daily routine. deli A4 Sketchbook deli A4 Sketchbook finenolo A4 Sketchbook finenolo A4 Sketchbook Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 14 4.7 out of 5 stars 14 4.9 out of 5 stars 17 4.9 out of 5 stars 17 Price £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £7.59 £ 7 . 59 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 Type Basic Sketchbook (Landscape) Basic Sketchbook (Portrait) Hardcover Sketchbook (Landscape) Hardcover Sketchbook (Portrait) Sheets / Pages 40 Sheets / 80 Pages 40 Sheets / 80 Pages 60 Sheets / 120 Pages 60 Sheets / 120 Pages Paper Weight 160GSM, Acid-Free 160GSM, Acid-Free 160GSM, Acid-Free 160GSM, Acid-Free Cover Card Cover + Thick Backing Card Cover + Thick Backing Durable Hardcover Front & Back Durable Hardcover Front & Back
